module_mood_contract: satisfied compounding — 'It runs while I sleep.' Ownership is the payoff. Student leaves with a clear mental map of five data shapes and knows where to start.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Mood contract named and honoured; mood floor 8+/10 on teaching beats.
rules_evaluated.evidence: trace.phases[1].mood_score=8; trace.close.mood_score=8. Teaching beat (reading doc building a mental map before M2). Pass 2 stub blocks now in maintainer block — not student-visible. Clean body delivers: 'files you already have, on the laptop you already use' (files), 'universal plug' analogy (MCP), 'text in, text out' insight (CLIs), 'Stripe archetype — the UI was never the product' (headless SaaS), 'tribal knowledge' framing (semantic models). SVP HR persona reads a complete principled frame and closes at 8/10 — credible and forward-pointing. Satisfied-compounding contract honoured.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Lead with discipline, not failure mode.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Doc leads with 'five shapes' — a positive discipline frame. No failure-mode title or opener.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Strategy-fidelity — supplementary correctly sequences touchpoints; no front-running.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Module touchpoints correctly mapped: Files → M2, MCP/CLIs → M4, Headless SaaS/Semantic skills → M7, Semantic models → M8. MCP introduced by analogy ('universal plug'), not as an invocable capability — consistent with M4 owning hands-on skill authoring. No front-running of skills-by-name or practitioner attributions that belong to later modules.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Strategic themes recur in Key Concepts.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Supplementary reading doc; no Key Concepts section. Rule fires on module files.
No Key Concepts section in supplementary.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Forcing functions live in prompts, not body prose.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Reading doc — no fenced prompt blocks, no forcing functions expected.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Body teaches the work; trainer manages the room outside text.
rules_evaluated.evidence: No authored conversation cues, pair/share beats, or trainer-stage-direction sentences in student-visible body.
Reading doc makes no forced-completion demands. Module touchpoint framing ('Referenced from: Module N') is informational, not prescriptive.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Meta-frame lectures are closers, not openers.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Not a lecture — a supplementary reference doc.
Supplementary reading, not a pre-exercise lecture.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Teaching moment lands across persona variation.
rules_evaluated.evidence: trace.phases[1]: five-shapes framework + summary table is the teaching moment. With stub blocks in maintainer block, student-visible body is clean. Fast operator reads headers + table and gets the rung progression without placeholder distraction. Opinionated senior reads 'teams over-integrate and under-curate' insight (line 70) and 'model's weakest skill is picking the right tool out of fifteen badly-named ones' (line 71) — both are credible one-liner practitioner-level insights that land without named examples. The SVP HR persona's 'I now know where to start and what the ceiling looks like' close is the designed teaching moment and it fires reliably.

Doc is a progressive framework — files first (M2), semantic models last (M8). Each rung defers full deployment to the appropriate module. Close: 'Most companies are still at files — which is fine, and also a lot better than where they were a year ago' — grounds the student without claiming completion. Forward-pointing without early resolution.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Big Idea fidelity — honours Bootstrap M2 strategy (satisfied compounding; build the memory first).
rules_evaluated.evidence: M2 Big Idea from content-strategy: 'a system remembers, grows, and compounds.' Body line 68: 'Build the memory first; wire the systems second.' Line 70-71: 'A team that starts with files and graduates to integrations ships faster than a team that starts with a platform selection.' Table close: 'Start at the top. Each rung unlocks a new set of agents and a new set of people.' All three directly instance compounding-as-throughline and the files-first instinct M2 teaches.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Module-to-module arc — supplementary read as prework before M2.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Supplementary is ORPHAN (not yet linked from module file). As orphan, no downstream hook required. Close hands off cleanly to M2's files-first exercise: 'Start at the top. Each rung unlocks a new set of agents and a new set of people.' Intro correctly scopes M2 as the first touchpoint without prematurely deploying M4/M7/M8 concepts.
